REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (662 24th Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brianna Mannion (via Zoom) for SF Public Administrator.
Andrew De Vries (via Zoom), agent for sellers.
David Werboff (via Zoom), agent for and with buyers, Leanne and Robert Pierce (via Zoom).

No one appeared to place an overbid. The sale was confirmed at $1,625,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
